title: Swap Adjacent In LR String
hints: Ignore the 'X' characters entirely and compare the remaining sequences of 'L' and 'R' in both strings.
The relative order of non-'X' characters must match, and 'L' can only move left while 'R' can only move right.
For every matched 'L' or 'R', verify its index in the start string is valid relative to its index in the end string.
